tools.name: Distilabel
tools.description: Python framework for synthetic data and AI feedback pipelines based on verified research papers. Supports complex multi-step data processing with LLMs, including instruction generation, reasoning trace distillation, and AI feedback loops.

tools.name: Gretel Navigator
tools.description: Synthetic data platform with Data Designer for generating datasets with embedded reasoning traces. Supports step-by-step explanation generation and reflection-guided reasoning.

tools.name: SWiRL (Step-Wise Reinforcement Learning)
tools.description: Two-stage methodology: generates multi-step reasoning and tool-use synthetic data, then applies step-wise RL to optimize LLMs. Breaks trajectories into sub-trajectories for fine-grained learning.

tools.name: Simula
tools.description: Seedless framework that balances global and local reasoning to generate synthetic datasets. Uses taxonomies for global coverage and agentic refinements for local diversity/complexity, with double-critic rejection sampling.

tools.name: NVIDIA Nemotron Pipeline
tools.description: Family of models (340B Instruct + Reward) forming a synthetic data generation pipeline. Includes 10T+ tokens of multilingual reasoning, coding, and safety data. NeMo Gym for multi-step agentic RL training.

tools.name: Microsoft Phi Synthetic Data Pipeline
tools.description: Pioneered 'textbook-quality' synthetic data generation for reasoning. Uses 50+ seed types, multi-agent prompting, self-revision workflows, and instruction reversal to create ~400B tokens of reasoning-focused training data.

tools.name: DeepSeek R1 Distillation Pipeline
tools.description: Generated 800K high-quality reasoning samples using R1 model, then distilled into smaller models (1.5B-70B). MIT licensed, supports commercial use and further distillation.

tools.name: Open-R1 (Hugging Face)
tools.description: Fully open reproduction of DeepSeek-R1 training. Includes generate.py script using Distilabel for synthetic reasoning data at scale. Released Mixture-of-Thoughts dataset (350K verified reasoning traces).

tools.name: Magpie
tools.description: Self-synthesis method for alignment data generation. Prompts aligned LLMs with nothing (just template) to generate both queries and responses. Magpie Reasoning V2 includes 250K CoT examples.

tools.name: Evol-Instruct / WizardLM
tools.description: Evolves simple instructions into increasingly complex ones using LLMs. Creates large-scale instruction datasets with varying complexity levels for math, code, and reasoning tasks.

tools.name: DataDreamer
tools.description: Python library for synthetic data generation and reproducible LLM workflows. Simplifies creation of instruction-tuning and alignment datasets with emphasis on reproducibility and best practices.

tools.name: Cosmopedia
tools.description: Largest open synthetic dataset (30M files, 25B tokens) of textbooks, blog posts, stories. Generated using Mixtral. Demonstrates scalable pre-training data synthesis methodology.

tools.name: CoT-Self-Instruct
tools.description: Method that instructs LLMs to reason via CoT based on seed tasks, then generate new synthetic examples of similar quality/complexity. Includes automatic filtering for quality control.

tools.name: HardGen Pipeline
tools.description: Automatic agentic pipeline for generating hard tool-use training samples with verifiable reasoning. Uses dynamic API Graph from agent failure cases and closed-loop evaluation feedback.

tools.name: Anthropic Constitutional AI (CAI)
tools.description: Earliest large-scale use of synthetic data for RLHF. Uses self-critique and revision against constitutional principles to generate alignment training data. Both SL and RL phases.

tools.name: MOSTLY AI
tools.description: Synthetic data platform powered by TabularARGN architecture. Focuses on tabular/text data with differential privacy. Primarily for data privacy and testing, not reasoning-specific.

tools.name: IBM LAB (Large-scale Alignment for chatBots)
tools.description: Taxonomy-driven synthetic data generation for knowledge, foundational skills, and compositional skills. Guides teacher models to generate instruction data that fills identified gaps in LLM capabilities.

tools.name: Bonito
tools.description: Open source model that transforms regular text into specialized training exercises for language models. Converts unstructured content into structured instruction-response pairs.

tools.name: Synthetic Data Generator (Argilla)
tools.description: UI-based tool built on Distilabel for building datasets using natural language. Allows non-technical users to create fine-tuning datasets through a guided interface.

tools.name: LlamaFactory
tools.description: Unified fine-tuning framework for 100+ LLMs. Includes data processing pipeline supporting synthetic data ingestion, with integrations to Easy Dataset, DataFlow, and GraphGen for synthetic data creation.

tools.name: Unsloth
tools.description: Fast fine-tuning library with synthetic data generation notebooks. Includes document-to-QA conversion pipeline and auto-cleaning for creating reasoning datasets from documents.

tools.name: K2view Synthetic Data
tools.description: Enterprise synthetic data platform combining generation with test data management and data masking. Gartner-recognized. Primarily for enterprise data testing, not LLM reasoning.
